notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with working asteroid splitting, UFO, hyperspace, beat audio, and extra lives, but the UFO shape is oddly drawn and the thrust flame rendering has a minor visual glitch with the flame path logic.

An incredibly accurate and well-crafted Asteroids clone, complete with synthesized Web Audio sound effects (including the accelerating heartbeat and UFO siren), wrap-around aiming for the UFO, safe respawn logic, and classic vector-style graphics; the only minor flaw is a hard freeze of all entities during the 2-second level transition.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with proper core systems and presentation, but it has notable authenticity/gamefeel issues like no saucer-vs-asteroid interactions, simplistic collision/wrapping behavior, and some audio/state edge-case roughness that keep it well below perfect.
